message:
feat(tui): in-TUI sources management surface with sync/doctor actions (2noh9.4.9)

Adds a Sources surface (Ctrl+Shift+S) showing configured sources with
sync status, schedule, and path counts. Supports navigation (j/k),
sync (s), doctor (d), and refresh (r) actions. Integrates with existing
SourcesConfig and SyncStatus infrastructure. 10 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
